rule_summary: Study-specific compiler rules for the Roux 2022 single-cell initiation snapshot. These rules preserve that the family is heterogeneity-resolving but still initiation-limited and pseudotime-supported rather than duration-authoritative.

conditions.condition_summary: Roux day-6 single-cell initiation snapshot with youthful movement entangled with identity suppression.
source_locators: Day-6 single-cell snapshot after 3-day pulse plus 3-day chase
Pseudotime-supported local ordering inside the initiation window
conditions.rule_basis: Treat the Roux single-cell arm as the strongest current initiation-phase heterogeneity family for false-win pressure, while explicitly preserving that pseudotime is local-ordering support and not real late-phase temporal calibration.
